mapper.sql: from subject s left join subject_type st on st.id = s.subject_type_id left join realm r on r.id = s.realm_id left join subject root_subject on root_subject.id = s.root_subject_id left join subject parent_subject on parent_subject.id = s.parent_subject_id
mapper.select: select * from subject where status = 1 order by create_time desc

select s.id, s.subject_type_id as subjectTypeId, st.code as subjectTypeCode, st.name as subjectTypeName, s.realm_id as realmId, r.code as realmCode, r.name as realmName, s.code, s.name, s.status, s.root_subject_id as rootSubjectId, root_subject.code as rootSubjectCode, root_subject.name as rootSubjectName, s.parent_subject_id as parentSubjectId, parent_subject.code as parentSubjectCode, parent_subject.name as parentSubjectName, s.is_root as isRoot, s.built_in as builtIn, s.description, ( select count(1) from subject_member sm where sm.subject_id = s.id and sm.status != 3 ) as memberCount, ( select count(1) from app_instance ai where ai.owner_subject_id = s.id ) as appCount, ( select count(1) from subject child where child.parent_subject_id = s.id ) as childCount, s.create_time as createTime, s.update_time as updateTime from subject s left join subject_type st on st.id = s.subject_type_id left join realm r on r.id = s.realm_id left join subject root_subject on root_subject.id = s.root_subject_id left join subject parent_subject on parent_subject.id = s.parent_subject_id where s.id = #{id}

select id, code, name from realm where id in
#{id}
select * from subject where parent_id = #{parentId} order by create_time asc
